top_findings.title: SQLite runs in :memory: mode — no durable persistence
top_findings.evidence: main.go:342 NewBookStore(":memory:"); schema created at main.go:42, but data is lost on every restart. REQUIREMENTS.json R7 how_to_verify: 'Persistence uses SQLite/embedded DB, not just in-memory state.'
top_findings.suggestion: Open a file-backed DB (e.g. sql.Open("sqlite", "books.db")) so data survives restarts, or make the path configurable via flag/env.
